name: Sybaris
description: This Tenno crafted, lever action rifle, is equal parts elegance and executioner.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: This Tenno crafted, lever action rifle, is equal parts elegance and executioner.

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Morphics
components.description:
An amorphous solid. Possibly Orokin technology.

Location: Mercury, Mars, Phobos, Europa, and Pluto

components.name: Rubedo
components.description:
A jagged crystalline ore. Gives off radiant energy.

Location: Earth, Lua, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna, and the Void

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Arca Plasmor, Sybaris/Sybaris Prime, and Grinlok

patchlogs.name: Oberon Prime: Hotfix 20.6.3
patchlogs.changes: The Sybaris Prime has had it's hip-fire / aim-fire recoil reviewed to have less side-to-side movement.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.8.0
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed the Dex Sybaris appearing on the ground as the regular Sybaris when disarmed from a Drahk Master.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.7.0
patchlogs.changes: •    Reduced the damage of the Dex Sybaris in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.6.3
patchlogs.fixes:
Increased the Dex Sybaris' ammo pool in Conclave.
Fixed the Dex Sybaris taking its energy color from the player’s Secondary, instead of its assigned color.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.6
patchlogs.changes: Sybaris damage has been increased in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 18: The Second Dream
patchlogs.changes: The following Conclave Weapon Skins have been added to Teshin’s Conclave Offerings at the Typhoon Standing:Sybaris Conclave Skin

patchlogs.name: Update 17.10.0
patchlogs.changes: The Following PvP Mods have been added to the drop tables for all Conclave game modesSudden Justice (Sybaris)

patchlogs.name: Update 17.1.0 - 17.1.4
patchlogs.changes: • Increased the damage of the Sybaris in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.4.3 + Credit Reimbursement #2
patchlogs.changes: Increased the damage of the Sybaris in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.4
patchlogs.changes: The following weapons have now been balanced for use in PvP: Sybaris, Karak, Kraken, Viper, Angstrum, AKViper, WraithViper and Tigris.

patchlogs.name: Update 13.3.0: Pack Hunters
patchlogs.additions: A Tenno-crafted lever action rifle, Sybaris is equal parts elegance and executioner. Find it in the Market or Tenno Research Lab today!
